error.offlineBody: Personal mode needs a connection. Check your network and try again.
error.authRequiredBody: Sign in to continue, or explore with demo data instead.
error.validation: Some information isn't valid. Please check and try again.
error.dataConflict: This was changed elsewhere. Please refresh and try again.
error.calculationRefused: We don't have enough information to calculate this yet.
error.storage: We couldn't save that. Please try again.
error.migration: The app needs an update before this can continue.
error.unexpected: Something unexpected happened. Please try again.
error.auth: We couldn't sign you in. Please check your details and try again.
error.authorization: You don't have access to do that.
error.consent: Please review and accept the current terms to continue.
error.connectivity: You're offline. Check your network and try again.
error.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.sync: We couldn't sync your data. Please try again.

home.subtitle: Your financial obligations, organized.
home.demoSubtitle: All figures are demonstration data. Not a real account.

obligations.title: Obligations
obligations.emptySubtitle: Obligations you add will appear here.

obligationDetail.title: Obligation Detail
obligationDetail.phaseNote: Detailed calculation view coming in a future update.
obligationDetail.notFoundSubtitle: This obligation may have been removed or the link is invalid.

rateImpact.title: Rate Impact
rateImpact.unsupported: Rate impact isn't available for this obligation type yet.

causes.rateIncreaseWithUnchangedInstallment: Your rate increased while your installment stayed the same, so more of each payment covers cost instead of principal.
causes.paymentShortfall: Recent payments have been below the amount needed to fully amortize the loan.
causes.contractualBalloon: This loan's contract includes a scheduled balloon payment at maturity.
causes.unknown: A residual balance is projected, but the specific cause could not be determined from available data.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.unsupported: Schedule isn't available for this obligation type yet.

scenario.title: Scenario Simulator
scenario.unsupported: The simulator isn't available for this obligation type yet.

bankQuestions.title: Bank Questions
bankQuestions.q1: What is the current outstanding principal and interest on this loan?
bankQuestions.q2: Can you provide the exact calculation for the new installment amount after the recent rate increase?
bankQuestions.q3: If I keep my installment unchanged, what is the estimated balloon payment at maturity?
bankQuestions.q4: Are there any penalties for making extra monthly payments towards the principal?
bankQuestions.q5: Can I extend the loan term to eliminate the residual risk without increasing my monthly installment?

onboarding.languageSubtitle: You can change this later in Settings.
onboarding.introBody: Track loans, Islamic financing, and credit cards in one honest place. Every number is labeled by source and confidence.
onboarding.introFeatureProvenance: Every figure labeled by source and confidence
onboarding.introFeatureMath: Honest financial math — no hidden rounding
onboarding.consentBody: This demo uses fictional data for illustrative purposes only. All figures are invented — they do not represent real accounts, real balances, or real financial advice.
onboarding.consentAcknowledge: I understand this is demonstration data
onboarding.modeTitle: How do you want to start?
onboarding.modeDemoSubtitle: No account needed. Pre-loaded with realistic fictional obligations.
onboarding.modeManualSubtitle: Type in your obligations manually. Available after launch.
onboarding.modeAccountSubtitle: Secure cloud storage with full privacy controls.

auth.signUpVerificationPendingBody: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Verify your email, then sign in.
auth.resetBody: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetSentBody: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent a link to reset your password.

learn.title: Learn
learn.subtitle: Understand loans, financing, and credit — in plain language.

settings.title: Settings
settings.resetDemoConfirmBody: This clears everything you have done in demo mode and restores the original seeded loan, Murabaha, and card. This cannot be undone.

rateIncreased.title: Rate increased
rateIncreased.body: Your interest rate increased from {{fromRate}}% to {{toRate}}%.

installmentUnchanged.title: Installment unchanged after rate increase
installmentUnchanged.body: Your installment remains {{installment}} JOD despite the rate increase. Your remaining balance may be higher than expected.

residualRisk.title: Residual balance risk
residualRisk.body: Based on your payment history and the rate change, your balance projection may exceed the original schedule. A calculation is pending.
